description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a minimalist rectangular design and a flat roof. The exterior is finished in a light gray concrete or stucco, with large, simple windows arranged asymmetrically on all sides. The front features a covered carport with two parked vehicles, a recessed entryway, and a small landscaped area with trees and plants. The house sits on a tiled platform that extends around the perimeter, providing a clean, urban look. The rear and side elevations are mostly solid, with a few windows and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing privacy and simplicity. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines, geometric forms, and a focus on function over decoration.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, and minimalist design, featuring a carport and asymmetrical windows. The structure is set on a tiled platform with sparse landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with two vehicles, main entryway, and landscaping with a tree and a palm.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by a solid gray wall with minimal windows and a single tree, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a balcony, additional entry, and more windows, with tiled ground and sparse plants.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible carport, several windows, and two small palm trees along the tiled edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, integrated into a covered carport, minimal steps, and no decorative columns.
